zh.lifeSummary: 當Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch於1235年出生在德國巴登可萊斯 奧分波格度爾巴賀霍恩格時，他的父親Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Graf35歲，母親Mechthild von Tübingen40歲。他於大約1294年與Adelheid Gräfin von Öttingen在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 堂瑙-利斯額廷根 在 貝也額廷根結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1298年4月17日在德國巴登-爾特波格霍恩洛可萊斯可勞海姆奧波恩多福享年63歲，埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 羅特魏爾素爾 阿姆 內卡吉賀格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch于1235年出生在德国巴登可萊斯 奧分波格度爾巴賀霍恩格时，他的父亲Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Graf35岁，母亲Mechthild von Tübingen40岁。他于大约1294年与Adelheid Gräfin von Öttingen在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 堂瑙-利斯額廷根 在 貝也額廷根结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1298年4月17日在德国巴登-爾特波格霍恩洛可萊斯可勞海姆奧波恩多福享年63岁，埋葬在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 羅特魏爾素爾 阿姆 內卡吉賀格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Albrecht
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch was born in 1235, in Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Germany, his father, Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Graf, was 35 and his mother, Mechthild von Tübingen, was 40. He married Adelheid Gräfin von Öttingen about 1294, in Oettingen, Oettingen in Bayern, Donau-Ries, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 17 April 1298, in Oberndorf, Krautheim, Hohenlohekreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 63, and was buried in Kirchberg, Sulz am Neckar, Rottweil, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch est né en 1235, à Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Allemagne, son père, Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Graf, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mechthild von Tübingen, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Adelheid Gräfin von Öttingen environ 1294, à Oettingen, Oettingen in Bayern, Landkreis Donau-Ries, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 17 avril 1298, à Oberndorf, Krautheim, Hohenlohekreis, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Kirchberg, Sulz am Neckar, Landkreis Rottweil, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch 1235 in Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Graf 35 und seine Mutter Mechthild von Tübingen 40. Er hat um 1294 in Oettingen, Oettingen in Bayern, Landkreis Donau-Ries, Bayern, Deutschland Adelheid Gräfin von Öttingen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 17. April 1298 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Oberndorf, Krautheim, Hohenlohekreis, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland und wurde in Kirchberg, Sulz am Neckar, Landkreis Rottweil, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch è nato il nel 1235 nel Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Germania, il suo padre, Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Graf, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Mechthild von Tübingen, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Adelheid Gräfin von Öttingen circa 1294, nel Oettingen, Oettingen in Bayern, Landkreis Donau-Ries, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 17 aprile 1298, nel Oberndorf, Krautheim, Hohenlohekreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Kirchberg, Sulz am Neckar, Landkreis Rottweil, Baden-Württemberg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerlochが1235年にドイツバデンクレイス オフエンブルグダルバチホーヘンバーグで生まれた時，父Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Grafは35歳，母Mechthild von Tübingenは40歳であった。約1294年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ドナウ-リーズオエッティンジェン イン バイエルンオエッティンジェンでAdelheid Gräfin von Öttingenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1298年4月17日にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグホーヘンロヘクレイスクラウスエイムオバーンドルフで63歳で死去し，ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグランドクレイス ロットウエイルスルズ アム ネッカーキルチバーグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch(이)가 1235년 독일 바든 크레이스 펜버그 뒤르바치 호헨버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Graf(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Mechthild von Tübingen(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1294년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 도나-리스 틴겐 인 베이른 틴겐에서 Adelheid Gräfin von Öttingen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1298년 4월 17일 독일 바데-wu르테버그 호헨로헤크레이스 크라테임 오버도르프에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 로트위 설즈 아 니c카르 커ch버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch nasceu em 1235, em Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Alemanha, seu pai, Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Graf, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mechthild von Tübingen, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelheid Gräfin von Öttingen aproximadamente 1294, em Oettingen, Oettingen in Bayern, Landkreis Donau-Ries, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 17 de abril de 1298, em Oberndorf, Krautheim, Hohenlohekreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Kirchberg, Sulz am Neckar, Landkreis Rottweil, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch родился в 1235 г. в местности хохенбирг, дурбач, крис оффенбург, баден, Германия, его отцу по имени Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Graf было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mechthild von Tübingen, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelheid Gräfin von Öttingen около 1294 г. в местности оеттинген, оеттинген ин беиирн, ландкрис донау-риесь, беиирн, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 17 апреля 1298 г. в местности обирндорф, краутим, хохенлохекрис, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности кирчбирг, сулз ам неккар, ландкрис роттвил, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.

es.Hohenberg An Der Eger,Oberfranken,Bavari: Hohenberg an der Eger, Landkreis Wunsiedel im Fichtelgebirge, Bayern, Alemania
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch nació en 1235, en Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Alemania, su papá, Burkhard V. von Hohenberg Graf, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mechthild von Tübingen, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Adelheid Gräfin von Öttingen aproximadamente 1294, en Oettingen, Oettingen in Bayern, Landkreis Donau-Ries, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 17 de abril de 1298, en Oberndorf, Krautheim, Hohenlohekreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Kirchberg, Sulz am Neckar, Landkreis Rottweil, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania.

th.–Female: ถึงแก่กรรม
th.1269–Male: ปี1269–ถึงแก่กรรม
th.Hohenberg, Rottenburg, Horb. Herrschaft: ฮอเฮนเบรก, ดัรบาช, กไรส อเฟนบอูรก, แบเดน, ประเทศเยอรมัน
th.Hohenberg, Schwarzwaldkreis, Wuerttlembe: ฮอเฮนเบรก, ดัรบาช, กไรส อเฟนบอูรก, แบเดน, ประเทศเยอรมัน
th.Deckenpfronn, Böblingen, Baden-Württembe: เดกเอนปฟรอน, กไรส บoบลิงยวน, แบเดน-วuร์ตเอมเบรก, ประเทศเยอรมัน
th.Kloster Kirchberg, Sulz am Neckar, Landk: เคิรชเบรก, ซ็อูลซ์ อาม เนการ์, ลันดกไรส โรตเหวย์ล, แบเดน-วuร์ตเอมเบรก, ประเทศเยอรมัน
th.Oettingen,Schwaben,Bavaria: อเอฒิงยวน, อเอฒิงยวน อิน แบเยรน, ลันดกไรส โดเนา-รีซ์, แบเยรน, ประเทศเยอรมัน
th.Hohenberg, Schwarzwaldkreis, Württemberg: ฮอเฮนเบรก, ดัรบาช, กไรส อเฟนบอูรก, แบเดน, ประเทศเยอรมัน
th.Kirchberg, Seitingen, Tuttlingen, Herrsc: เคิรชเบรก, สไอตอิงยวน, โอเบรามต ตอูตลิงยวน, วuร์ตเอมเบรก, ประเทศเยอรมัน
th.Hohenberg, Lilienfeld, Lower Austria, Au: ฮอเฮนเบรก, ลิลีนฟเอลด์, นีเดรoสตร์รไอช, ออสเตรีย
th.Hohenberg An Der Eger,Oberfranken,Bavari: ฮอเฮนเบรก อาน เดอร์ เอจร์ร์, ลันดกไรส อู๋นเซียเดล อิม ฟิชตเอลเกเอบิรจ, แบเยรน, ประเทศเยอรมัน
th.Schlacht auf den Kreuzwiesen nahe der Bu: โอเบรนโดรฟ, แครอูเทอิม, ฮอเฮนโลเฮกไรส, แบเดน-วuร์ตเอมเบรก, ประเทศเยอรมัน
